portugal_ifici.name: Portugal IFICI (ex-NHR)
portugal_ifici.full_name: Incentivo Fiscal à Capitalização e ao Investimento
eligible_activities: Highly qualified professionals (list of qualifying activities)
eligibility_requirements: Not have been Portuguese tax resident in last 5 years
portugal_ifici.notable_benefits: 20% flat rate on qualifying Portuguese income. Foreign income may be exempt.
pitfalls: Qualifying activities list is restricted (not everyone qualifies)
Less generous than old NHR for passive income

uae_golden_visa.name: UAE Golden Visa
uae_golden_visa.physical_presence_note: No minimum days required to maintain golden visa

cyprus_non_dom.name: Cyprus Non-Domicile Regime
cyprus_non_dom.income_from_abroad: only taxed on income from Cyprus
eligibility_requirements: Not domiciled in Cyprus (not born there OR domicile of origin elsewhere)
Tax resident in Cyprus (183 days OR 60-day rule)
Never been Cyprus tax resident for >17 of last 20 years

sixty_day_rule.description: Can establish Cyprus tax residency with just 60 days presence
conditions: Spend at least 60 days in Cyprus
Not spend more than 183 days in any other country
Not be tax resident in any other country

benefits: 0% tax on dividends from worldwide companies
0% on gains from securities (stocks, bonds, ETFs)

malta_non_dom.name: Malta Non-Dom Regime
malta_non_dom.foreign_income: taxed only if remitted to Malta
malta_non_dom.eligibility: Be tax resident but not domiciled in Malta
benefits: Foreign income and gains exempt unless remitted
Capital gains from foreign assets exempt
best_for: Those wanting EU base without high tax

malta_hnwi.name: Malta HNWI Programme
eligibility: Min annual income EUR 100,000+ from abroad
Must own/rent property in Malta
Must not be in employment in Malta
best_for: High income individuals wanting EU residence with low flat rate

italy_flat_tax_100k.name: Italy Foreign Income Flat Tax
italy_flat_tax_100k.flat_amount_note: EUR 100,000 per year covers ALL foreign income
italy_flat_tax_100k.additional_family_note: EUR 25,000 extra per qualifying family member
eligibility: Not been Italian tax resident in 9 of last 10 years
Transfer tax residence to Italy
No minimum investment required
italy_flat_tax_100k.foreign_income_coverage: ALL foreign source income regardless of amount
benefits: Covers unlimited foreign income for EUR 100k/year
No reporting of foreign assets held pre-move
Can exclude specific countries (for foreign tax credits)
pitfalls: Italian domestic income taxed at regular rates
Crypto: complex treatment if bought in Italy
High cost if foreign income is small

italy_7pct_south.name: Italy 7% Southern Regime
eligibility: Foreign retiree with pension from abroad
Not Italian tax resident in last 5 years
Must buy/rent in qualifying municipality
best_for: Foreign retirees seeking EU lifestyle at very low tax

swiss_lump_sum.name: Switzerland Lump-Sum Taxation
eligibility: Non-Swiss nationality
First time taking Swiss residency OR absent 10+ years
Not gainfully employed in Switzerland
swiss_lump_sum.tax_base: Annual living expenses in Switzerland (min varies by canton)
swiss_lump_sum.minimum_tax_note: Minimum CHF ~400k/year basis in most cantons. Actual varies significantly
benefits: Based on lifestyle expenses, not actual income
pitfalls: Some cantons have abolished it (Zurich, Bern, Basel)

israel_oleh_exemption.name: Israel New Immigrant (Oleh) Exemption
israel_oleh_exemption.exemption: 100% exemption on ALL foreign income and assets
israel_oleh_exemption.reporting_note: No reporting of foreign income required during exemption period
eligibility: Make aliyah (immigrate to Israel) as new immigrant
OR returning resident after 10+ consecutive years abroad
benefits: Complete exemption - no Israeli tax on any foreign income
No reporting requirements on foreign assets
Valid for full 10 years from immigration date
Can extend with additional conditions in some cases
pitfalls: Must actually live in Israel (center of life)
High cost of living in major cities
best_for: Jewish individuals with large foreign income

singapore_global_investor.name: Singapore Global Investor Programme
benefits: Singapore PR and path to citizenship
Territorial tax system (0% on foreign income)

greece_100k_flat_tax.name: Greece Alternative Taxation for Foreign Income
greece_100k_flat_tax.investment_note: Must invest EUR 500k in Greek real estate, businesses or securities
eligibility: Not Greek tax resident in 7 of last 8 years
Transfer tax residence to Greece
Invest EUR 500k+ in Greece
benefits: All foreign income covered for EUR 100k/year flat
Golden Visa if investment is real estate (EUR 250k+)

uae_freezone.name: UAE Free Zone Company
uae_freezone.corporate_tax_note: 0% for qualifying freezone companies on qualifying income
uae_freezone.substance_note: Must have real economic substance for 0% rate

georgia_virtual_zone.name: Georgia Virtual Zone
georgia_virtual_zone.corporate_tax_note: 0% on IT services delivered outside Georgia
eligibility: IT companies providing services outside Georgia

portugal_golden_visa.name: Portugal Golden Visa
portugal_golden_visa.status_note: Real estate option removed 2023. Investment funds/VC/jobs remain
benefits: Path to EU citizenship in 5 years
best_for: Those seeking EU citizenship with minimal residency

cyprus_60_day.name: Cyprus 60-Day Rule
conditions: Spend at least 60 days in Cyprus per year
Not spend more than 183 days in any single country
Not be tax resident in another country
Have economic connection to Cyprus (work, business, property)
cyprus_60_day.enables: Full Cyprus tax residency and non-dom status
cyprus_60_day.benefits: 0% dividend, 0% interest, low corporate tax, no CGT on securities

netherlands_30pct.name: Netherlands 30% Ruling
netherlands_30pct.status_note: Duration reduced from 5 to max 5 years (with evaluation)
netherlands_30pct.discount_note: 30% of gross salary can be paid tax-free as expense allowance
eligibility: Recruited from abroad
Must have lived more than 150km from Dutch border before
Specific salary threshold required
netherlands_30pct.effective_reduction: Reduces effective tax rate significantly on qualifying salary
